info.headline: Severe Thunderstorm Warning for North East Pastoral forecast district
info.description:
Severe thunderstorms are likely to produce heavy rainfall that may lead to flash flooding in the warning area over the next several hours. Locations which may be affected include Arkaroola, the area east of Lake Frome and the Strzelecki Track south of Moomba.
46.6mm was recorded at the Gammon Ranges in the 2 hours to 7:05am.
info.instruction: The State Emergency Service advises that people should: * Don't drive, ride or walk through flood water. * Keep clear of creeks and storm drains. * Stay indoors, away from windows, while storms are nearby.
